prompt: A polished anime fantasy illustration of Leafa from Sword Art Online, shown as a youthful elf girl with long golden-blonde hair in a very high ponytail tied with a large pale green bow, loose side bangs, and two thin front braids framing her face. She has pointed elf ears, vivid green eyes, and a soft confident smile while looking directly at the viewer. She is posed in midair or perched on a cloud with one knee raised close to her chest and both arms wrapped around her leg, creating a dynamic foreshortened composition from a slightly low angle. Give her translucent pale mint fairy wings glowing behind her, spread wide and luminous. Her outfit is the classic green fairy warrior costume: a deep green tunic dress with white trim and layered skirt panels, white long sleeves, white thigh-high stockings with jagged upper edges, dark brown belts and straps at the waist and thighs, and brown knee-high leather boots. The scene is set high above a sunlit fantasy city with tall stone towers, ornate architecture, bridges, drifting clouds, and warm golden sunset light. Use a soft atmospheric background blur, cinematic rim light, subtle sparkles, and clean high-detail anime rendering with vibrant colors, smooth shading, and an airy heroic mood.
